nasb.text: He went as far as the king’s gate, for no one was to enter the king’s gate clothed in sackcloth.

esv.text: He went up to the entrance of the king’s gate, for no one was allowed to enter the king’s gate clothed in sackcloth.

cnv.text: 他到了御門前，就停住，因為身穿麻衣的，不可以進御門。

ccb.text: 一直走到宫门前才停住，因为穿麻衣的不可进宫门。
